site.name: EchoLog
site.description: A quiet place for notes, drafts, and longer reflections.

posts.title: Hello EchoLog
posts.excerpt: The first local post used to wire the site settings and admin tools together.
posts.content: This post is stored in `backend/data/store.local.json` and can be edited from the `/thesky9531` management page.

posts.title: Writing Workflow
posts.excerpt: Use the management page to update navigation, ICP info, or any post content.
posts.content: Navigation items can point to a local post slug or any external URL. The backend resolves post navigation into public links automatically.
